Main table → Arithmetic → Limit

Limit

Instruction Type and Width        Instruction description
                                  Performs limit operation on a source into a destination. Each
Vector Limit
                                  source is 40-bit wide. The destination is 40-bit wide.
                                  Performs limit operation on a source into a destination. Each
Vector Limit Long
                                  source is 72-bit wide. The destination is 72-bit wide.
                                  Performs two limit operations on a source into destination. Each
Vector Limit Word Parts           source is 20-bit wide. Each result is 20-bit wide packed into into
                                  40-bit destination.
